product_overview: A Django-based e-commerce backend that serves store content pages, supports newsletter and contact form submissions, manages a session-based shopping cart, and integrates Razorpay for checkout and payment verification. It also provides an admin interface for managing store and payment records.
core_goals: Display storefront content including home, about, shop, and product detail pages
Capture newsletter subscriptions and contact inquiries through public forms
Enable session-based cart management with add, view, update, and remove actions
Create Razorpay payment orders from cart contents or a fallback product
Verify payments, generate invoices, and clear purchased cart data
Provide an authenticated Django admin for operational management

features.name: Home Page & Newsletter
features.description: Renders the home page with product and community highlights and allows visitors to subscribe to the newsletter.
user_flows: GET / with anonymous visitor -> Receive 200 HTML home page with products and community context -> POST / with valid name and email -> Receive 302 redirect back to /
POST / with missing or invalid newsletter fields -> Receive form handling error and remain on the home page

features.name: About Page
features.description: Displays the about page with product listings and brand information.
user_flows: GET /about/ with anonymous visitor -> Receive 200 HTML about page
GET /about/ when the page is unavailable -> Receive 404 response

features.name: Shop Page
features.description: Shows the full shop listing page with all available products.
user_flows: GET /shop/ with anonymous visitor -> Receive 200 HTML page with products
GET /shop/ when no products are available -> Receive 200 HTML page with empty product listing

features.name: Product Detail
features.description: Shows an individual product detail page based on product ID.
user_flows: GET /p/{pid}/ with a valid product ID -> Receive 200 HTML page with product details
GET /p/{pid}/ with a non-existent product ID -> Receive 404 Product not found

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: Lets visitors submit a contact message using a sanitized form.
user_flows: GET /contact/ with anonymous visitor -> Receive 200 HTML contact form page -> POST /contact/ with valid name, email, and message -> Receive 302 redirect back to /contact/ with success message
POST /contact/ with invalid or incomplete fields -> Receive 302 redirect back to /contact/ with error message
POST /contact/ with HTML content in message -> Receive sanitized submission handling before redirect

features.name: Cart Management
features.description: Provides a session-based cart for adding products, viewing totals, updating quantities, and removing items.
user_flows: POST /cart/add/{pid}/ with valid product ID, size, and quantity -> Receive 302 redirect to /cart/ -> GET /cart/ -> Receive 200 HTML page with cart items, totals, and cart count
POST /cart/add/{pid}/ with product ID that does not exist -> Receive 404 Product not found
POST /cart/update/{item_id}/ with action increase -> Receive 200 JSON with updated quantity, subtotal, cart total, and cart count
POST /cart/update/{item_id}/ with action decrease until quantity reaches 0 -> Receive 200 JSON indicating item removal or zero quantity state
GET /cart/remove/{item_id}/ -> Receive 302 redirect to /cart/

features.name: Razorpay Order Creation
features.description: Creates a Razorpay payment order from cart contents, or falls back to a single product when the cart is empty.
user_flows: POST /payments/create-order/ with items present in the session cart -> Receive 200 JSON with order_id, amount in paise, currency, and key_id
POST /payments/create-order/ with empty cart and valid product_id -> Receive 200 JSON with Razorpay order details for the fallback product
POST /payments/create-order/ with invalid product_id -> Receive 404 Product not found
POST /payments/create-order/ with malformed request data -> Receive 400 error response

features.name: Payment Verification & Invoice
features.description: Verifies Razorpay payment signatures, records payment completion, generates invoices, links purchased products, and clears the cart.
user_flows: POST /payments/verify-payment/ with valid payment_id, razorpay_order_id, razorpay_signature, and customer details -> Receive 200 JSON with success status and message
POST /payments/verify-payment/ with invalid razorpay_signature -> Receive 400 Invalid signature or error
POST /payments/verify-payment/ with unknown razorpay_order_id -> Receive 404 Order not found
POST /payments/verify-payment/ after successful cart checkout -> Receive 200 response and cart data is cleared after invoice generation

features.name: Django Admin
features.description: Provides the authenticated admin dashboard for managing store and payment models.
user_flows: GET /admin/ with valid authenticated staff credentials -> Receive 200 Admin HTML page
GET /admin/ without authentication -> Receive denied access or redirect to admin login page

features.name: Home Page & Newsletter
features.description: Renders home page with products and community items. Handles newsletter subscription via contact form POST.

endpoints.description: Display home page with products and community items

response_schema.200: HTML page with products and community context

endpoints.description: Subscribe to newsletter with name and email

features.name: About Page
features.description: Renders the about page with product listings

features.name: Shop Page
features.description: Renders the shop listing page with all products

endpoints.description: Display shop page with all products

features.name: Product Detail
features.description: Renders individual product detail page by product_id

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: Contact page with form submission supporting name, email, message. Input sanitized via Bleach.

response_schema.302: Redirect to contact page with success/error message

features.name: Cart Management
features.description: Session-based shopping cart with add, view, update (increase/decrease quantity), and remove operations

endpoints.description: Add product to cart (creates session if needed, updates quantity if item with same size exists)

response_schema.200: HTML page with cart items, total, and cart count

endpoints.description: Update cart item quantity (increase/decrease). Deletes item if quantity reaches 0.

features.name: Razorpay Order Creation
features.description: Creates a Razorpay payment order. Calculates amount from cart items or single product fallback.

endpoints.description: Create a Razorpay order for checkout

body.product_id: string (optional, fallback if cart is empty)

features.name: Payment Verification & Invoice
features.description: Verifies Razorpay payment signature, updates order status, generates invoice, links products, and clears cart

endpoints.description: Verify payment signature and generate invoice

features.name: Django Admin
features.description: Django admin interface for managing all models

known_limitations.issue: No CSRF protection on verify_payments endpoint (uses @csrf_exempt)
known_limitations.impact: Payment verification endpoint is vulnerable to CSRF attacks

known_limitations.issue: No input validation on product_id in create_orders
known_limitations.impact: Invalid product_id values are not validated before database lookup

known_limitations.issue: Session-based cart has no expiry mechanism
known_limitations.impact: Cart items persist indefinitely without cleanup

known_limitations.issue: No authentication required for payment endpoints
known_limitations.impact: Any user can create orders and verify payments without authentication

known_limitations.issue: Typo in invoice model field name (invioce_id instead of invoice_id)
known_limitations.impact: Inconsistent field naming that could cause confusion

known_limitations.issue: process_checkout view uses hardcoded dummy product data
known_limitations.impact: Email invoice contains dummy data instead of actual order products
